name: CLR DLL Loaded Via Office Application
notes:
This rule detects CLR DLL being loaded by an Office Product.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Antonlovesdnb
SIGMA Title: CLR DLL Loaded Via Office Applications
SIGMA Description: Detects CLR DLL being loaded by an Office Product


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of clr.dll
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(excel|mspub|onenote|onenoteim|outlook|powerpnt|winword)\.exe' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY CLR DLL Loaded Via Office Application on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of clr.dll
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES '(excel|mspub|onenote|onenoteim|outlook|powerpnt|winword)\.exe' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: CLR DLL Loaded Via Office Application
Event description: Detects CLR DLL being loaded by an Office Product
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
